tool.name: aoptk download PDFs
tool.description: Download PDFs for a list of publication IDs.

configfiles.configfile:
from aoptk.literature.databases.pmc import PMC import os
with open("$input_file", "r") as f: ids = [line.strip() for line in f.readlines()]
pmc = PMC("", storage = "./") pmc.id_list = ids pdfs = pmc.pdfs()

param.name: input_file
param.label: List of IDs to search for.
param.help: Input text file with IDs to search for.

tool.help:
Download PDFs ===================
Tool to download PDFs for a list of publication IDs.
